title: Shooting April
overview: Truman, Weasel, and Doug videotape everything! From their Jackass-style pranks and death-defying stunts to their sleazy sexual conquests, they record it all with their camcorder! When a shy girl named April rebuffs Truman at a party, he makes a wager with Weasel and Doug that either convinces April to have sex with him or he pays them a hundred bucks each. Truman invites April to a desolate cabin for the weekend with Weasel behind the hidden camera to unknowingly capture the few, final agonizing hours of April's life!
